title: Commit AGENTS.md cli-mode refresh
description: AGENTS.md was regenerated by cleo init --force, flipping from file-mode (@.cleo/memory-bridge.md + @.cleo/nexus-bridge.md) to cli-mode (# Run: cleo memory digest --brief). Commit this change atomically.
acceptance: AGENTS.md diff shows clean transition from file refs to cli directive
Commit references the bridge-mode change and T1013
Biome clean, no lint errors

title: Add missing sentient_proposal_day unique index to tasks.db
description: T1008 acceptance criteria promised a DB-enforced rate limit via UNIQUE INDEX sentient_proposal_day. The index does not exist in the schema. Add it via Drizzle migration or ALTER TABLE.
acceptance: Index sentient_proposal_day exists in tasks.db schema
Rate limiter uses index for fast daily-cap lookup
Migration is idempotent and reversible
Tests verify index prevents duplicate proposals per day

title: Enable Tier 2 proposals by default or wire owner config
description: Tier 2 proposals are disabled by default (tier2Enabled=false). T1008 claims Tier 2 is done but the feature is inactive. Wire config so Tier 2 can be enabled, or set sensible default.
acceptance: Tier 2 can be activated without code changes
cleo sentient propose list shows enabled state when active
Config documented in cleo config or AGENTS.md
Kill-switch still respected when Tier 2 is enabled

title: Verify T944 fractal ontology — kind+scope replaces type
description: T944 claims type was replaced by kind+scope. Audit schema, migrations, and code to confirm kind exists and type is deprecated. Fix gaps.
acceptance: kind column exists in tasks.db or type is confirmed repurposed
All queries use kind+scope, not type
Migration backfills kind from type if needed
No code references deprecated type column for new features

title: Re-verify T943 State SSoT with real evidence atoms
description: T943 verification gates were all overridden with no real evidence. Re-run quality gates and record actual commit/file/tool evidence.
acceptance: computeTaskView exists and is exported from SDK
Tests pass with real test-run evidence
Biome clean on affected files
Verification gates re-set with non-override atoms

title: Wire Living Brain verbs through dispatch registry (Phase 3)
description: T1107 is blocked on wiring 14 Living Brain verbs through dispatch registry. Query/mutate must be reachable programmatically and via CLI.
acceptance: All 14 verbs registered in OPERATIONS registry
cleo schema <verb> returns params and gates for each
Programmatic query/mutate reachability verified end-to-end
Registry parity test passes

title: Verify conduit messaging end-to-end (Phase 4)
description: Conduit is connected but has zero messages. Verify LocalTransport can send and receive messages between agent and daemon.
acceptance: cleo conduit status shows messages sent/received > 0
Agent can send message to daemon and get response
Message persistence verified in conduit.db
Poller runs without errors

title: Run real-world sandbox scenario (Phase 4)
description: T1111 requires a real-world sandbox scenario proving 5-substrate Living Brain end-to-end. Execute the scenario and collect evidence.
acceptance: Multi-project task-to-symbol-to-brain traversal works
Sentient daemon picks task and records telemetry
Proposal generated or anomaly detected
Evidence captured in .cleo/agent-outputs/ with timestamps
